name: Social Media Tools
description: Client-side helpers for crafting, styling, and mocking up social media content and posts.

tools.name: Fake Tweet Generator
tools.description: Create realistic X/Twitter post mockups downloadable as images.

tools.name: Instagram Font Generator
tools.description: Convert text into copy-paste Unicode fancy fonts for bios and captions.

tools.name: Instagram Hashtag Generator
tools.description: Suggest and group relevant hashtags from keywords or topics.

tools.name: Twitter Character Counter
tools.description: Count characters against the 280-limit with weighted counting.

tools.name: Fake Instagram Post Generator
tools.description: Generate realistic Instagram post mockups with custom likes and avatar.

tools.name: Instagram Bio Generator
tools.description: Build stylish IG bios with line breaks, fonts, and symbols.

tools.name: Instagram Caption Generator
tools.description: Generate caption ideas from a topic plus hashtags and emojis.

tools.name: YouTube Tag Extractor
tools.description: Extract video tags from a YouTube URL or page source.

tools.name: YouTube Thumbnail Downloader
tools.description: Grab all thumbnail sizes from a YouTube video URL.

tools.name: Instagram Line Break Generator
tools.description: Add invisible spacing so captions keep line breaks on Instagram.

tools.name: Emoji Picker
tools.description: Searchable emoji keyboard for copying emojis into posts.

tools.name: Fake Facebook Post Generator
tools.description: Create Facebook post mockups with reactions and comments.

tools.name: Tweet to Image
tools.description: Turn real or custom tweet text into a shareable styled image.

tools.name: TikTok Hashtag Generator
tools.description: Generate trending-style hashtags and captions for TikTok.

tools.name: Strikethrough Text Generator
tools.description: Create strikethrough and underline Unicode text for social.

tools.name: Glitch Text Generator
tools.description: Generate zalgo/glitch styled text for posts and usernames.

tools.name: Small Text Generator
tools.description: Convert text to superscript and small-caps Unicode characters.

tools.name: Discord Font Generator
tools.description: Produce fancy and formatted text usable in Discord chats.

tools.name: Twitter Bio Generator
tools.description: Build X/Twitter bios with fonts, line breaks, and emojis.

tools.name: LinkedIn Text Formatter
tools.description: Add bold/italic Unicode formatting to LinkedIn posts.

tools.name: WhatsApp Link Generator
tools.description: Create wa.me click-to-chat links with prefilled messages.

tools.name: Social Media Image Sizes
tools.description: Reference of current image/video dimensions per platform.

tools.name: Bold Text Generator
tools.description: Convert text into bold Unicode for platforms without formatting.

tools.name: Cursive Text Generator
tools.description: Generate cursive and italic Unicode text styles.

tools.name: Upside Down Text Generator
tools.description: Flip text into upside-down characters for fun posts.

tools.name: Twitch Text Generator
tools.description: Create stylized text and name ideas for Twitch profiles.

tools.name: Fake Instagram DM Generator
tools.description: Mock up Instagram DM chat and profile screenshots.

tools.name: Hashtag Counter
tools.description: Count hashtags in text and flag platform over-limits.

tools.name: Social Preview Tester
tools.description: Preview how a link will look when shared across platforms.

tools.name: Aesthetic Username Generator
tools.description: Generate decorated usernames with symbols and aesthetic fonts.
